name: Symal Group Limited
analysis: SYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.8700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.0300, stop A$2.4948, target A$3.3944 (0.68:1) — then trail it.
